name: Orbit
description: A high-performance analytics dashboard processing 10M+ events/day. Built with a custom WebSocket architecture and interactive D3.js visualizations.

name: Forma
description: A comprehensive design system and component library used across 6 products, with 200+ components and full accessibility support.

name: Pulse
description: A mobile-first health tracking application with ML-powered insights, serving 50K+ active users on iOS and Android.

name: Atlas
description: An open-source API gateway with rate limiting, auth, and monitoring. 2K+ GitHub stars and adopted by 300+ teams.
